positive: A stylized, vibrant illustration featuring a majestic owl perched on a crescent moon, surrounded by intricate constellations and blooming magical flora. The composition should be perfectly centered and symmetrical, designed as a seamless repeating pattern element. The aesthetic blends neo-Victorian naturalism with cosmic fantasy art. Use deep indigo blues, ethereal golds, soft mint greens, and pops of luminous magenta. Strong, crisp linework, high contrast, and a minimalist silhouette feel. Focus on clean edges and bold shapes that translate well to direct-to-garment printing. Cinematic, illustrative quality, suitable for a t-shirt print.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, noise, poor anatomy, mutated, extra limbs, low contrast, photographic, photorealistic, logo, signature, copyright, trademark, messy, dirty
